title: FDIC and OCC Both Want to Be Stablecoins' New Boss
message_html: FDIC and OCC Both Want to Be Stablecoins' New Boss ...
snippet: Washington has decided that stablecoins are too significant, economically and systemically, to remain outside the regulatory perimeter. Now comes the rulemaking. title: ECB Governor Sounds Warnings on AI and Stablecoins
message_html: ECB Governor Sounds Warnings on AI and Stablecoins ...
snippet: A European Central Bank official wants bankers to test their infrastructure for artificial intelligence-related threats.
